dashboard.label: Heart Health
dashboard.description: Intraday HR, resting HR trend, BPM distribution
dashboard.definition: {"title":"Heart Health","description":"Heart rate, resting HR, BPM distribution, and cardiovascular / vascular-age health","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-7d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"}},"dataSources":{"ds_resting_hr":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | stats min(bpm) as resting_hr | table resting_hr","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}}},"ds_hr_stats":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | stats avg(bpm) as avg_hr, max(bpm) as max_hr, min(bpm) as min_hr | eval avg_hr=round(avg_hr,0) | table avg_hr, max_hr, min_hr"}},"ds_intraday":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | table _time, bpm | sort _time"}},"ds_resting_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | eval day=strftime(_time,\"%Y-%m-%d\") | stats min(bpm) as \"Resting HR\" by day | sort day"}},"ds_distribution":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=heart_rate | dedup timestamp | eval bpm_bucket=tostring(floor(bpm/5)*5).\"-\".tostring(floor(bpm/5)*5+4) | stats count by bpm_bucket | sort bpm_bucket"}},"ds_zone_inputs":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura (oura_data_type=personal_info) OR (oura_data_type=resting_hr_baseline) | eventstats max(age) as user_age, max(resting_hr_baseline) as resting_hr | stats latest(user_age) as age, latest(resting_hr) as resting_hr | eval max_hr=220-age | eval hrr=max_hr-resting_hr | table age, resting_hr, max_hr, hrr","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}}},"ds_cardio_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura (oura_data_type=cardio_age OR oura_data_type=personal_info) | eval age_val=if(oura_data_type=\"personal_info\", age, null()) | eventstats max(age_val) as actual_age | where oura_data_type=\"cardio_age\" | dedup day | sort -_time | head 1 | eval pwv=round(pulse_wave_velocity,1), delta=vascular_age-actual_age | table vascular_age, pwv, actual_age, delta","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-45d","latest":"now"}}},"ds_cardio_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura (oura_data_type=cardio_age OR oura_data_type=personal_info) | eval age_val=if(oura_data_type=\"personal_info\", age, null()) | eventstats max(age_val) as actual_age | where oura_data_type=\"cardio_age\" | dedup day | timechart span=1d@d latest(vascular_age) as \"Vascular Age\", latest(actual_age) as \"Your Age\"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"resting_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resting_hr"},"options":{"majorField":"resting_hr","majorColor":"#E8503A","majorFontSize":72,"label":"Resting HR","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('resting_hr')"},"title":"Resting Heart Rate"},"avg_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hr_stats"},"options":{"majorField":"avg_hr","majorColor":"#E8503A","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Avg BPM","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('avg_hr')"},"title":"Average BPM"},"min_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hr_stats"},"options":{"majorField":"min_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Min BPM","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('min_hr')"},"title":"Minimum BPM"},"max_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hr_stats"},"options":{"majorField":"max_hr","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Max BPM","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('max_hr')"},"title":"Maximum BPM"},"intraday_line":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Intraday Heart Rate","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_intraday"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#E8503A"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","lineWidth":1.5,"showDots":false,"yAxisTitle":"BPM","xAxisTitle":"Time"}},"resting_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Resting HR Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resting_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"day","seriesColors":["#E8503A"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Resting BPM","xAxisTitle":"Date"}},"distribution_bar":{"type":"splunk.column","title":"BPM Distribution","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_distribution"},"options":{"xAxisField":"bpm_bucket","seriesColors":["#E8503A"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","yAxisTitle":"Sample Count","xAxisTitle":"BPM Range"}},"age_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_inputs"},"options":{"majorField":"age","majorColor":"#A78BFA","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Age","showLabel":true,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('age')"},"title":"Age"},"max_hr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_inputs"},"options":{"majorField":"max_hr","majorColor":"#E8503A","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Max HR (220 - age)","showLabel":true,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('max_hr')"},"title":"Calculated Max HR"},"hrr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_inputs"},"options":{"majorField":"hrr","majorColor":"#4263B8","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Heart Rate Reserve","showLabel":true,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('hrr')"},"title":"HR Reserve"},"cardio_va_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_cardio_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"vascular_age","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Vascular Age","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('vascular_age')","unit":" yrs","unitPosition":"after","majorColor":"#4263B8"},"title":"Vascular Age"},"cardio_delta_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_cardio_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"delta","majorFontSize":42,"label":"vs Actual Age","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('delta')","unit":" yrs","unitPosition":"after","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":-100,"to":0,"value":"#4CAF50"},{"from":0,"to":5,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":5,"to":100,"value":"#E8503A"}]}},"title":"Vascular vs Actual Age"},"cardio_pwv_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_cardio_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"pwv","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Pulse Wave Velocity","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('pwv')","unit":" m/s","unitPosition":"after","majorColor":"#A78BFA"},"title":"Pulse Wave Velocity"},"cardio_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_cardio_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4263B8","#8a93a0"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Age (yrs)"},"title":"Vascular Age Trend (vs Your Age)"}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"Heart Rate"},{"layoutId":"layout_2","label":"Cardiovascular"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"resting_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":280,"h":200}},{"item":"avg_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":320,"y":20,"w":215,"h":200}},{"item":"min_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":555,"y":20,"w":215,"h":200}},{"item":"max_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":790,"y":20,"w":215,"h":200}},{"item":"intraday_line","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":240,"w":1400,"h":280}},{"item":"resting_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":540,"w":680,"h":280}},{"item":"distribution_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":740,"y":540,"w":680,"h":280}}],"options":{"width":1440,"height":830,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}}},"layout_2":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1440,"height":510,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}},"structure":[{"item":"age_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":220,"h":170}},{"item":"max_hr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":250,"y":20,"w":220,"h":170}},{"item":"hrr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":480,"y":20,"w":220,"h":170}},{"item":"cardio_va_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":710,"y":20,"w":220,"h":170}},{"item":"cardio_delta_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":940,"y":20,"w":220,"h":170}},{"item":"cardio_pwv_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1170,"y":20,"w":250,"h":170}},{"item":"cardio_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":210,"w":1400,"h":280}}]}}}}
